title: Agility in Manufacturing Preparedness Act of 2025
short_title: Agility in Manufacturing Preparedness Act of 2025
plain_summary: This bill lets a government health agency called BARDA work more closely with companies that make manufacturing technology and special manufacturing institutes. The goal is to help create better technologies so the country can be more prepared for health emergencies. By working together, they can improve how quickly and effectively the US can respond when health crises happen. This partnership will help make sure we have the right tools and systems ready before emergencies occur.
last_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.

sections.title: Section 1 Short Title
sections.text: This law can be called the Agility in Manufacturing Preparedness Act of two thousand twenty five.

sections.title: Section 2 Increasing BARDA Strategic Initiatives
sections.text: This section changes an existing law about the Biomedical Advanced Research and Development Authority, which is a government agency known as BARDA. BARDA helps prepare the country for health emergencies by developing medical products and treatments. The changes allow BARDA to work more closely with manufacturing technology companies and platforms when planning their response efforts. The law also lets BARDA partner with a network of special manufacturing institutes called Manufacturing USA institutes. These institutes were created under another law called the National Institute of Standards and Technology Act. When BARDA works with these institutes on biomanufacturing missions, they can develop, test, and put into use new technologies and response abilities that will help improve how ready the country is for public health and medical emergencies.
